<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of phpunit/php-code-coverage. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace SebastianBergmann\CodeCoverage\Driver; use function sprintf; use RuntimeException; use SebastianBergmann\CodeCoverage\Exception; final class XdebugVersionNotSupportedException extends RuntimeException implements Exception { /** * @param non-empty-string $version */ public function __construct(string $version) { parent::__construct( sprintf( 'Version %s of the Xdebug extension is not supported', $version, ), ); } }
